descriptions.slack-api: Any interaction with the Slack API.
descriptions.slack-read-all: All read operations across the entire Slack API, including messages, users, files, reactions, search, pins, bookmarks, and reminders.
descriptions.slack-write-all: All write operations across the entire Slack API, including sending messages, managing conversations, updating profiles, uploading files, and modifying pins, bookmarks, and reminders.
descriptions.slack-auth-read: Check authentication status and list teams.
descriptions.slack-chat-read: Get message permalinks and list scheduled messages.
descriptions.slack-chat-write: Send, update, delete, and schedule messages.
descriptions.slack-conversations-read: Read conversation history, details, members, and replies.
descriptions.slack-conversations-write: Create, archive, rename, and manage conversations, including membership, invitations, topics, and purposes.
descriptions.slack-users-read: Read user profiles, presence, identity, and look up users by email.
descriptions.slack-users-write: Update user presence and profile information.
descriptions.slack-files-read: List and inspect files, including remote files.
descriptions.slack-files-write: Upload, delete, and share files, including remote files.
descriptions.slack-reactions-read: List and inspect emoji reactions on messages.
descriptions.slack-search: Search messages, files, and all content.
descriptions.slack-pins-read: List pinned messages in a conversation.
descriptions.slack-pins-write: Pin or unpin messages in a conversation.

descriptions.discord-api: Any request to the Discord API.
descriptions.discord-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Discord resource.
descriptions.discord-write-messages: Send, edit, or delete messages in Discord channels.
descriptions.discord-write-channels: Create, edit, or delete Discord channels.
descriptions.discord-write-guilds: Create, edit, or delete Discord servers (guilds).

descriptions.github-rest-api: Any interaction with the GitHub REST API, excluding GraphQL.
descriptions.github-write-all: Create, update, or delete any GitHub resource.
descriptions.github-write-repos: Create, update, or delete repository resources.
descriptions.github-read-pulls: Read pull requests and their details.
descriptions.github-write-pulls: Create, edit, or merge pull requests.
descriptions.github-read-user: Read the authenticated user's profile and related information.
descriptions.github-search: Search across GitHub repositories, code, issues, and users.
descriptions.github-write-notifications: Mark notifications as read or manage notification subscriptions.

descriptions.github-git: Any Git protocol operation (clone, fetch, push) on GitHub.
descriptions.github-git-read: Read-only Git operations on GitHub: clone and fetch.

descriptions.gitlab-write-projects: Create, update, or delete GitLab projects.
descriptions.gitlab-read-repository: View repository contents, branches, tags, and commits on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-write-repository: Modify repository contents, branches, tags, or commits on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-read-merge-requests: List or view merge requests on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-write-merge-requests: Create, update, or delete merge requests on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-read-issues: List or view issues on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-write-issues: Create, update, or delete issues on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-read-pipelines: View CI/CD pipelines and jobs on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-write-pipelines: Run, retry, or cancel CI/CD pipelines and jobs on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-read-users: View user profiles and information on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-read-groups: List or view groups on GitLab.
descriptions.gitlab-write-groups: Create, update, or delete groups on GitLab.

descriptions.gitlab-git: Git operations (clone, fetch, push) on GitLab repositories.
descriptions.gitlab-git-read: Read-only Git operations (clone, fetch) on GitLab repositories.
descriptions.gitlab-git-write: Git push operations on GitLab repositories.

descriptions.dropbox-files-read: Read-only Dropbox file operations such as listing, downloading, searching, and exporting files.
descriptions.dropbox-files-write: Dropbox file modifications such as copying, moving, uploading, deleting, and organizing files and folders.
descriptions.dropbox-sharing-read: Read-only Dropbox sharing operations such as checking permissions and listing shared items.
descriptions.dropbox-sharing-write: Dropbox sharing modifications such as creating, updating, and revoking shared links and folder memberships.

descriptions.linear-api: All requests to the Linear API.

descriptions.notion-api: Any request to the Notion API.
descriptions.notion-read-all: Read any Notion content, including searching across all resources.
descriptions.notion-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Notion content.
descriptions.notion-read-pages: Read Notion pages and their properties.
descriptions.notion-read-blocks: Read Notion blocks (the content elements within pages).
descriptions.notion-read-databases: Read Notion databases and their schemas.
descriptions.notion-query-databases: Query a Notion database to retrieve filtered and sorted entries.
descriptions.notion-read-users: List or retrieve Notion workspace users.
descriptions.notion-read-comments: Read comments on Notion pages or blocks.
descriptions.notion-write-comments: Add comments to Notion pages or blocks.
descriptions.notion-search: Search across all Notion pages and databases.

descriptions.mailchimp-api: Any request to the Mailchimp API.
descriptions.mailchimp-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Mailchimp resource.
descriptions.mailchimp-write-campaigns: Create, update, or delete Mailchimp campaigns.
descriptions.mailchimp-write-lists: Create, update, or delete Mailchimp lists (audiences).
descriptions.mailchimp-write-templates: Create, update, or delete Mailchimp email templates.
descriptions.mailchimp-write-automations: Create, update, or delete Mailchimp automations.
descriptions.mailchimp-read-reports: Read Mailchimp campaign reports and analytics.
descriptions.mailchimp-read-file-manager: Read files and folders in the Mailchimp file manager.
descriptions.mailchimp-write-file-manager: Upload, update, or delete files and folders in the Mailchimp file manager.
descriptions.mailchimp-read-ecommerce: Read Mailchimp e-commerce data (stores, products, orders).
descriptions.mailchimp-write-ecommerce: Create, update, or delete Mailchimp e-commerce data (stores, products, orders).

descriptions.zoom-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Zoom data.
descriptions.zoom-write-recordings: Create, update, or delete meeting and user recordings.

descriptions.telegram-api: Matches any request to the Telegram Bot API.
descriptions.telegram-send-messages: Send messages, media, locations, polls, and other content, or forward and copy messages.
descriptions.telegram-manage-messages: Edit, delete, or react to existing messages and stop active polls.
descriptions.telegram-updates: Receive updates and manage webhook configuration.
descriptions.telegram-manage-chats: Manage chat members, permissions, invite links, forum topics, and chat settings.
descriptions.telegram-bot-info: Read and update the bot's profile, commands, description, and default settings.
descriptions.telegram-stickers: Send stickers and manage sticker sets, including creating, editing, and deleting them.
descriptions.telegram-payments: Send invoices, handle shipping and checkout queries, and manage Telegram Star payments and subscriptions.

descriptions.sentry-api: Any request to the Sentry API.
descriptions.sentry-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Sentry data.
descriptions.sentry-read-issues: View issues and events in Sentry.
descriptions.sentry-write-issues: Create, update, or delete Sentry issues.
descriptions.sentry-write-projects: Create, update, or delete Sentry projects.
descriptions.sentry-write-releases: Create, update, or delete Sentry releases.

descriptions.aws-s3: Any access to AWS S3 object storage.
descriptions.aws-s3-read: Read objects and metadata from AWS S3.
descriptions.aws-s3-write: Create, update, and delete objects in AWS S3.
descriptions.aws-ec2: Any access to AWS EC2 virtual machines.
descriptions.aws-iam: Any access to AWS IAM identity and access management.
descriptions.aws-sts: Any access to AWS STS for temporary security credentials.
descriptions.aws-lambda: Any access to AWS Lambda serverless functions.
descriptions.aws-dynamodb: Any access to AWS DynamoDB NoSQL database.
descriptions.aws-cloudformation: Any access to AWS CloudFormation infrastructure-as-code.
descriptions.aws-logs: Any access to AWS CloudWatch Logs.
descriptions.aws-cloudwatch: Any access to AWS CloudWatch monitoring and metrics.
descriptions.aws-sns: Any access to AWS SNS push notifications.
descriptions.aws-sqs: Any access to AWS SQS message queues.
descriptions.aws-ssm: Any access to AWS Systems Manager.
descriptions.aws-secretsmanager: Any access to AWS Secrets Manager.
descriptions.aws-route53: Any access to AWS Route 53 DNS management.
descriptions.aws-ecs: Any access to AWS ECS container orchestration.
descriptions.aws-ecr: Any access to AWS ECR container image registry.
descriptions.aws-eks: Any access to AWS EKS managed Kubernetes.
descriptions.aws-bedrock: Any access to AWS Bedrock foundation models.
descriptions.aws-cloudfront: Any access to AWS CloudFront content delivery.
descriptions.aws-rds: Any access to AWS RDS managed relational databases.
descriptions.aws-kms: Any access to AWS KMS encryption key management.
descriptions.aws-elb: Any access to AWS Elastic Load Balancing.
descriptions.aws-cloudtrail: Any access to AWS CloudTrail audit logging.
descriptions.aws-eventbridge: Any access to AWS EventBridge event routing.
descriptions.aws-kinesis: Any access to AWS Kinesis data streaming.

descriptions.stripe-api: Any interaction with the Stripe API.
descriptions.stripe-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Stripe resource.
descriptions.stripe-read-payments: View charges, payment intents, setup intents, and setup attempts.
descriptions.stripe-write-payments: Create, update, or delete charges, payment intents, and setup intents.
descriptions.stripe-read-subscriptions: View subscriptions, subscription items, and subscription schedules.
descriptions.stripe-write-subscriptions: Create, update, or delete subscriptions, subscription items, and subscription schedules.
descriptions.stripe-write-invoices: Create, update, or delete invoices and invoice items.
descriptions.stripe-write-products: Create, update, or delete products and prices.

descriptions.figma-api: Any request to the Figma API.
descriptions.figma-write-all: Create, update, or delete anything in Figma.
descriptions.figma-read-files: Read Figma files, including their images, metadata, and versions.
descriptions.figma-write-comments: Post or delete comments on Figma files.
descriptions.figma-read-projects: List team projects and project files.
descriptions.figma-read-components: Read components, component sets, and styles from Figma files or teams.
descriptions.figma-read-webhooks: List webhooks and read their details.
descriptions.figma-write-variables: Create or update variables in Figma files.
descriptions.figma-read-dev-resources: Read dev resources from Figma files.
descriptions.figma-write-dev-resources: Create, update, or delete dev resources in Figma files.

descriptions.calendly-api: Identifies requests to the Calendly API.
descriptions.calendly-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Calendly resource.
descriptions.calendly-read-scheduled-events: View scheduled events and invitee no-shows.
descriptions.calendly-write-scheduled-events: Cancel scheduled events and manage invitee no-shows.
descriptions.calendly-read-event-types: View event types, their available times, and memberships.
descriptions.calendly-write-event-types: Create or update event types, including one-off event types.
descriptions.calendly-read-availability: View user busy times and availability schedules.
descriptions.calendly-read-organizations: View organization details, memberships, and invitations.
descriptions.calendly-write-organizations: Create or remove organization invitations and memberships.
descriptions.calendly-read-routing-forms: View routing forms and their submissions.
descriptions.calendly-write-data-compliance: Request deletion of event or invitee data for compliance purposes.

descriptions.yelp-api: Any request to the Yelp API.
descriptions.yelp-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Yelp data.
descriptions.yelp-write-businesses: Create, update, or delete businesses and transactions.
descriptions.yelp-read-reviews: Read reviews and review highlights for a business.
descriptions.yelp-read-categories: List or look up business categories.
descriptions.yelp-ai-chat: Send messages to the Yelp AI chat.

descriptions.coolify-api: Identifies requests to the Coolify API.
descriptions.coolify-read-all: List and inspect all Coolify resources, excluding actions like start, stop, restart, deploy, and similar operations.
descriptions.coolify-write-all: Create, update, delete, and perform actions (start, stop, restart, deploy, etc.) on all Coolify resources.

descriptions.umami-api: Identifies requests to the Umami Cloud API.
descriptions.umami-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Umami resource.
descriptions.umami-read-websites: List websites or view a single website's details.
descriptions.umami-read-stats: View analytics data for a website, including pageviews, sessions, events, and metrics.
descriptions.umami-read-teams: List or view teams and their details.
descriptions.umami-read-me: View the current user's profile information.

descriptions.google-gmail-api: Any request to the Gmail API.
descriptions.google-gmail-write-all: Create, update, or delete anything in Gmail.
descriptions.google-gmail-write-messages: Create, update, or delete messages, including uploads.
descriptions.google-gmail-write-drafts: Create, update, or delete drafts, including uploads.
descriptions.google-gmail-read-settings: Read account settings such as filters, forwarding, and IMAP/POP configuration.
descriptions.google-gmail-write-settings: Change account settings such as filters, forwarding, and IMAP/POP configuration.

descriptions.google-calendar-api: Identify requests to the Google Calendar API.
descriptions.google-calendar-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Google Calendar resource.
descriptions.google-calendar-write-events: Create, update, or delete events on calendars.
descriptions.google-calendar-write-calendars: Create, update, delete, or clear calendars.
descriptions.google-calendar-read-calendar-list: Read the user's list of calendars.
descriptions.google-calendar-write-calendar-list: Add, update, or remove calendars from the user's calendar list.
descriptions.google-calendar-read-acl: Read access control rules on calendars.
descriptions.google-calendar-write-acl: Create, update, or delete access control rules on calendars.
descriptions.google-calendar-read-colors: Read available calendar and event colors.

descriptions.google-drive-api: Any request to the Google Drive API.
descriptions.google-drive-write-all: Create, update, or delete anything in Google Drive.
descriptions.google-drive-read-files: List files or retrieve file metadata.
descriptions.google-drive-write-files: Create, upload, update, or delete files.
descriptions.google-drive-write-permissions: Share, modify, or revoke sharing permissions on files.
descriptions.google-drive-read-comments: View comments and replies on files.
descriptions.google-drive-write-comments: Add, edit, or delete comments and replies on files.
descriptions.google-drive-read-about: Retrieve information about the user's Drive account and settings.

descriptions.google-docs-api: Any request to the Google Docs API.
descriptions.google-docs-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Google Docs resource.
descriptions.google-docs-update-documents: Apply batch updates to a document's content.

descriptions.google-sheets-api: Any request to the Google Sheets API.
descriptions.google-sheets-write-all: Create, update, or delete anything in Google Sheets.
descriptions.google-sheets-read-spreadsheets: Read spreadsheet metadata (title, sheets, properties, etc.).
descriptions.google-sheets-update-spreadsheets: Modify spreadsheet structure or formatting via batch updates.
descriptions.google-sheets-read-values: Read cell values from a spreadsheet.
descriptions.google-sheets-write-values: Write or append cell values in a spreadsheet.

descriptions.google-people-api: Any request to the Google People API.
descriptions.google-people-read-all: Read anything from the Google People API.
descriptions.google-people-write-all: Create, update, or delete anything in the Google People API.
descriptions.google-people-write-contact-groups: Create, update, or delete contact groups.
descriptions.google-people-read-other-contacts: List or read other contacts (contacts outside the user's address book).
descriptions.google-people-write-other-contacts: Create, update, or delete other contacts (contacts outside the user's address book).

descriptions.google-analytics-api: Any request to the Google Analytics API (data and admin endpoints).
descriptions.google-analytics-read-all: Read-only access to all Google Analytics resources.
descriptions.google-analytics-write-all: Write access to all Google Analytics resources.
descriptions.google-analytics-run-reports: Run analytics reports, including standard, pivot, real-time, batch, compatibility, and access reports.
descriptions.google-analytics-read-metadata: Read metadata (available dimensions and metrics) for an analytics property.
descriptions.google-analytics-read-accounts: List or view Google Analytics accounts and account summaries.
descriptions.google-analytics-read-properties: List or view Google Analytics properties.
descriptions.google-analytics-write-properties: Create, update, or delete Google Analytics properties.
descriptions.google-analytics-read-data-streams: List or view data streams for a Google Analytics property.
descriptions.google-analytics-write-data-streams: Create, update, or delete data streams for a Google Analytics property.

descriptions.google-directions-api: Matches all Google Routes API traffic.
descriptions.google-directions-write-all: Create, update, or delete any Google Directions data.
descriptions.google-directions-compute-route-matrix: Compute a distance and duration matrix between multiple origins and destinations.
